message:
🐛 Fix Playwright nightly mobile-safari timeouts (#10391)

- Add kc-demo-mode to navbar-responsive setupPage() to prevent stalling API calls
- Wait for navbar visibility after domcontentloaded in setupPage()
- Wait for #root visibility in setupDashboardTest() for webkit stability
- Use force click on overflow button to bypass webkit animation instability

Fixes persistent mobile-safari failures in Playwright Cross-Browser (Nightly):
  - navbar-responsive: overflow menu click timeout
  - Dashboard: beforeEach setupDashboardTest timeout

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
